title: Bulk upload / mutate
excerpt: Is there a way to do a bulk update / mutate of data? Suppose I have a table and I want to mutate a lot of it. Do I need to do it cell-by-cell using a single mutate and change_column_values and a series of API requests? I…

posts.author: davidenergy (David Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to do a bulk update / mutate of data? Suppose I have a table and I want to mutate a lot of it. Do I need to do it cell-by-cell using a single mutate and change_column_values and a series of API requests? Is there a way to do it all in one request, just like how we can update a postgres table using one request?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @davidenergy,

You can use this method to send more than one mutation in the same HTTP request.

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Glad to help @davidenergy
